summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Worship Team Database authentication system. Backend authentication APIs are 100% functional with all endpoints working correctly. Frontend authentication flow works but has intermittent login issues that may be related to form state management or timing.

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent login failures - form sometimes gets stuck in loading state
ui_bugs.details: Login works successfully in some cases but fails intermittently. Backend API works perfectly when tested directly. Issue appears to be frontend form state management or timing related.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login occasionally returns 401 despite correct credentials
integration_issues.details: Backend logs show both successful (200) and failed (401) login attempts with same credentials, suggesting frontend request formatting issue.

passed_tests: Backend API - Invalid credentials rejection (401 response)
Backend API - Get users list (GET /api/users) - Master Admin only
Backend API - Create new user (POST /api/auth/register) - Master Admin only
Backend API - Unauthorized access protection (401 for missing token)
Frontend - Login form elements present with correct data-testids
Frontend - Successful login redirects to dashboard
Frontend - Master Admin role displayed in sidebar
Frontend - Users navigation link visible for Master Admin
Frontend - Users page accessible for Master Admin
Frontend - Protected pages redirect to login when not authenticated
Frontend - Invalid login credentials properly rejected
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix intermittent frontend login issue: The login form occasionally gets stuck in loading state or sends malformed requests resulting in 401 errors. Backend authentication is working perfectly. Investigate frontend form state management, axios request formatting, or add retry logic for failed login attempts.
